'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 57''' was the fifty-seventh issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[January 29]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The Fate of [[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]]
*[[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]]
*[[Mara Jade Skywalker]]
*[[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] - [[Garbage Compactor 3263827|Trash Compactor]]
*[[MixRMastR|Robo-Bartenders]]
*[[Sonic pistol|Sonic Weaponry]]
*[[J-type diplomatic barge/Legends|Naboo Royal Cruiser]]
